summary_markdown:
# V3-EXQ-141 -- MECH-111 Novelty/Curiosity Drive Discriminative Pair

**Status:** FAIL
**Claims:** MECH-111
**Decision:** hybridize
**Seeds:** [42, 43, 44]
**Conditions:** NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON vs NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED
**Warmup:** 200 eps x 200 steps  **Eval:** 50 eps x 200 steps
**Env:** CausalGridWorld size=10, 5 hazards, 5 resources nav_bias=0.3
**novelty_bonus_weight:** 0.1

## Design

MECH-111 asserts E1 prediction-error surprise at moderate magnitudes generates intrinsic positive valence (curiosity/novelty drive). The experiment compares NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON (E1 EMA bonus active) against NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED (no bonus) across 3 matched seeds. Key test: does the drive increase exploration (entropy, cell coverage) without increasing harm (curiosity-surprise is safe, not alarm-surprise)?

## Pre-Registered Thresholds

C1: per-seed entropy_gap (ON-ABLATED) >= 0.1 (both seeds)
C2: per-seed cell_gap (ON-ABLATED) >= 3 (both seeds)
C3: per-seed harm_delta (ON-ABLATED) <= 0.02 (both seeds)
C4: novelty_ema_ON > 1e-06 both seeds (signal non-zero)
C5: n_harm_min >= 10 both conditions (data quality)

## Results

| Condition | entropy | novel_cells | harm_rate |
|-----------|---------|-------------|----------|
| NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON      | -0.0000 | 52.3 | 0.0000 |
| NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED | -0.0000 | 52.3 | 0.0000 |

**per-seed entropy_gap: [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]**
**per-seed cell_gap: [0, 0, 0]**
**per-seed harm_delta: [0.0, 0.0, 0.0]**

## PASS Criteria

| Criterion | Result | Value |
|---|---|---|
| C1: entropy_gap >= 0.1 (both seeds) | FAIL | [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] |
| C2: cell_gap >= 3 (both seeds) | FAIL | [0, 0, 0] |
| C3: harm_delta <= 0.02 (both seeds) | PASS | [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] |
| C4: novelty_ema_ON > 1e-06 (both seeds) | PASS | [9.57e-05, 0.0001645, 8.84e-05] |
| C5: n_harm_min >= 10 | FAIL | 0 |

Criteria met: 2/5 -> **FAIL**

## Interpretation

MECH-111 NOT SUPPORTED: novelty bonus does not produce measurable exploration increase. E1 error may be too uniform across states, or the EMA is not feeding back into E3 selection effectively. Criteria: C1=False C2=False C3=True C4=True C5=False.

## Per-Seed Detail

NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON:
  seed=42: entropy=-0.0000 cells=52 harm_rate=0.0000 novelty_ema=0.00010
  seed=43: entropy=-0.0000 cells=53 harm_rate=0.0000 novelty_ema=0.00016
  seed=44: entropy=-0.0000 cells=52 harm_rate=0.0000 novelty_ema=0.00009

NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED:
  seed=42: entropy=-0.0000 cells=52 harm_rate=0.0000
  seed=43: entropy=-0.0000 cells=53 harm_rate=0.0000
  seed=44: entropy=-0.0000 cells=52 harm_rate=0.0000

## Failure Notes

- C1 FAIL: per-seed entropy_gap [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] < 0.1 -- novelty bonus does not produce measurable entropy increase
- C2 FAIL: per-seed cell_gap [0, 0, 0] < 3 -- novelty drive does not increase novel cell coverage
- C5 FAIL: n_harm_min=0 < 10 -- insufficient harm contacts; increase nav_bias or eval episodes
substrate_correction_note: Retests MECH-111 on the post-2026-04-15 commit-chain-corrected substrate (BreathOscillator + _committed_step_idx + Q-042 running_variance fixes all landed). EXQ-141 (2026-03-29) FAIL/weakens reclassified as substrate-confounded by 2026-05-08 MECH-307 analysis. If 141b PASSes or partial-PASSes, MECH-111 remains live; if it FAILS again, the MECH-307 conjunction-fix substrate is the next architectural lever.
evidence_direction_note: Reclassified weakens -> non_contributory 2026-05-08T19:35Z (per /diagnose-errors + analysis session). Three measurement-validity bugs identified: (1) novelty_bonus_weight=0.10 produced 1e-5 effective E3 score perturbation, 4-6 OOM below E3 score scale (O(0.1-1.0)) so the substrate flag had no behavioural consequence; (2) nav_bias action override torch.randint(0, ACTION_DIM, (1, ACTION_DIM), dtype=torch.float32) produced a [1, ACTION_DIM] tensor of random ints argmax'd to action 0 on ties, making the 'random exploration' deterministic and biased identically across arms; (3) n_harm_min=0 across both arms in 10000 eval steps confirms broken exploration. Smoking-gun signature: bit-identical metrics across arms (mean_entropy_on=mean_entropy_abl=-9.99e-10; mean_cells_on=mean_cells_abl=52.33; harm_rate=0 both). Two truly-different conditions cannot produce bit-identical aggregates across 3 seeds * 50 eval episodes unless the differing config has zero behavioural effect. Successor V3-EXQ-141c (queued 2026-05-08T19:00Z) applies all three fixes plus a C0 action-divergence sanity check that explicitly fails-fast on bit-identical arm collapse. Do NOT weight 141b as evidence against MECH-111.
